const styles={container:{padding:'2em 1em',maxWidth:'1200px',margin:'0 auto'},// Header styles
header:{textAlign:'center',marginBottom:'3em'},title:{fontSize:'2.2em',color:'#00796b',marginBottom:'0.4em',fontWeight:'700'},icon:{verticalAlign:'middle',marginRight:'0.3em'},subtitle:{fontSize:'1.1em',color:'#616161',maxWidth:'600px',margin:'0 auto',lineHeight:'1.6'},// Responsive grid layout
